items.definition_en: (of particles) Very fine
items.context_sentence: Ultrafine dust levels will stay “bad” nationwide.

items.definition_en: To broadcast as a live stream.
items.context_sentence: The figures include people who watched the initial livestream as well as those who streamed the performance again within the following day

items.definition_en: a line drawn underneath (especially under written matter)
items.context_sentence:
The Navy says the deployment is meant to underscore 
both the submarine’s operational capability and cooperation 
between the South Korean and Canadian navies.

items.definition_en: (of speed) greater than the speed of sound in a given medium (especially air)
items.example_en: a supersonic bomber flies so fast that it must release its bombs while the target is still over the horizon
items.context_sentence:
#2 
South Korea has launched its domestically produced supersonic fighter jet.

items.definition_en: a metric unit of length equal to 1000 meters (or 0.621371 miles)
items.context_sentence:
The 3-thousand-ton vessel is set to sail 14-thousand kilometres 
to Esquimalt Harbour in Victoria, arriving in late May, 
before conducting combined drills with Canada in early June.

items.definition_en: with respect to the internal affairs of a government
items.example_en: domestically, the president proposes a more moderate economic policy
items.context_sentence:
#2 
South Korea has launched its domestically produced supersonic fighter jet.

items.definition_en: a will to succeed
items.example_en: Morgan has an aspiration of winning the game.
items.context_sentence:
It was a decade in the making, and President Lee Jae Myung 
hailed the first delivery of a KF-21 as a symbol of South Korea's 
"aspiration for self-reliant defense" over more than half a century.

items.definition_en: relying on another for support

items.definition_en: A metadata tag, signaled by a preceding hash sign (#), used to label content.
items.context_sentence:
Netflix also reported that its concert-related content 
has reached 2-point-6-2 billion global social impressions to date, 
solely on its official channels,
while numerous hashtags linked to BTS and Netflix trended around the world.

items.definition_en: to a remarkable degree or extent
items.context_sentence:
Moving to the weather forecast,
It’s been unusually mild lately.

items.definition_en: one of the elements that collectively form a system of numeration
items.context_sentence:
#4
South Korea's demographic landscape saw a rare bright spot 
at the start of the year, with births and marriages 
both posting double-digit growth.

items.definition_en: the ratio of live births in an area to the population of that area; expressed per 1000 population per year
items.example_en: Muckspreading increases the fertility of the soil.
items.context_sentence:
The total fertility rate—
the average number of children a woman is expected to have—
neared the 1-point-zero mark, 
rising by zero-point-one-zero on-year to zero-point-nine-nine.

items.definition_en: a discussion intended to produce an agreement
items.example_en: the buyout negotiation lasted several days
items.context_sentence:
However, Tehran has denied that any negotiations are underway, 
vowing to continue its fight.

items.definition_en: harmony of people's opinions or actions or characters
items.example_en: the two parties were in agreement
items.context_sentence:
According to the Ministry of Data and Statistics on Wednesday, 
26-thousand-9-hundred-16 babies were born in January 2026.

items.definition_en: a submersible warship usually armed with torpedoes
items.context_sentence:
#3
The South Korean Navy submarine Dosan Ahn Chang-ho left the Peninsula 
on Wednesday, to take part in a joint exercise with the Royal Canadian Navy, 
in the first trans-Pacific deployment for Korea's naval submarine.

items.definition_en: currently in progress

vowing to continue its fight.

items.definition_en: an act of traveling by water
items.context_sentence: The mission will mark the first Pacific crossing by a South Korean Navy submarine, and its longest voyage on record.

items.context_sentence:

while an Iranian missile strike also wounded at least nine people in central Israel.
